UserProfilePublic.title: Public User Profile
UserProfilePublic.description: Stores user profile information visible to others.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

username.description: The display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

UserProfilePrivate.title: Private User Profile
UserProfilePrivate.description: Stores sensitive user information, accessible only by the owner.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

DreamEntry.title: Dream Entry
DreamEntry.description: A single dream entry created by a user.

authorUid.description: UID of the user who created the entry.

content.description: The detailed content of the dream.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the dream.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image associated with the dream.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of when the entry was created.

isPublic.description: Whether the entry is visible to others.

Follow.title: Follow Relationship
Follow.description: Tracks which users follow each other.

followerUid.description: UID of the user who is following.

followingUid.description: UID of the user being followed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the follow occurred.
